summary: Complete testing of User Authentication feature for Climate Risk Platform. All 12 backend API tests passed. All 7 frontend features verified working via Playwright automation.

issues: Minor React hydration warning in console for span inside select element - does not affect functionality

seed_data_creation: Test user already existed in DB: test@example.com/test123456. Additional TEST_ prefixed users created during backend tests.
context_for_next_testing_agent: Authentication system fully tested and working. Both JWT email/password and Google OAuth flows implemented. Google OAuth requires real Emergent Auth redirect (MOCKED for automated tests). Session tokens stored in localStorage and validated via /api/auth/me. All auth routes at /api/auth/* working correctly.
passed_tests: TestRegister::test_register_creates_user_returns_session_token - POST /api/auth/register creates user and returns session_token
TestGetCurrentUser::test_me_returns_user_with_valid_token - GET /api/auth/me returns user data with valid token
Login page displays with Google button and email/password tabs
Register tab shows name/email/password fields and Create Account button
Login with valid credentials redirects to dashboard
Sidebar shows user name (Test User) and email (test@example.com) after login
Sign out button clears session and returns to login page
Navigation to all pages (portfolios, browser, impact, etc.) works after login
New account registration via Register tab works and redirects to dashboard

mocked_apis_list: Google OAuth session exchange (requires real Emergent Auth redirect flow, cannot be automated)
